omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may collect data about your use of the Games, such as gameplay data and your interactions with other players inside the Games.
We may collect data about your use of the Games, such as gameplay data and your interactions with other players inside the Games.
We collect data about your device, such as device name and operating system, browser type and language for better understand user expectaion and better serve ads if present in games.

Cookies and similar technologies or third party tolls may use.
• We may collect data we receive if you link a third party tool with the Games
(such as Facebook or Google).
• We may collect data for advertising and analytics purposes, so we can provide
you a better game experience.

What data we collect and the ways we collect personal or non personal data about
you:
• we may collect Profile information you may give when you play some of games.
• We may collect data about game progress.
• We collect data about your device, such as device name and operating system,
browser type and language for better understand user expectaion and better
serve ads if present in games.
• We may collect data about your use of the Games, such as gameplay data and
your interactions with other players inside the Games.

To provide a great Games to our players, we have a legitimate interest to collect and process necessary data to:
• We may collect data and use to develop and improve the Games and player experience, manage our relationship with you,
,
provide social features as part of the Games and enable you to communicate with other players, Customize your game experience,
respond to your comments and questions and provide player support, send you related information, such as information about our company or our features, products or games, including but not limited to by sending you notifications (if you do not want to receive further notifications from us, you can always disable this option) or promotional material from some of our partners, or to contact you when necessary, unless the customer has disagreed that for and uses its data.
